shellCommands.command: pwd && ls -la && find src -maxdepth 3 -type f | sort | head -80 && cat package.json
grep -R "touch" -n README.md docs src | head -60 && grep -R "handleShowTooltipDelayed\|tooltipShowDelayTimerRef" -n src/components/Tooltip
grep -R "openEvents\|closeEvents" -n README.md docs | head -80 && git grep -n "touch" $(git rev-list --all | head -20) -- src/components/Tooltip 2>/dev/null | head
